projectDescription: A URL-to-QR-code generation service built with Astro and deployed on Cloudflare Workers, exposing a REST API that returns SVG QR codes.
keyFeatures: QR code generation from URLs via REST API, returning SVG output
Custom foreground and background hex color support for QR codes
CORS allowlist via ALLOWED_ORIGINS environment variable
Deployed as a Cloudflare Worker using Astro's server-side rendering adapter
Built-in web UI for interactive QR code generation
Health check endpoint for uptime monitoring
Input validation: URL format, protocol allow-list (http/https), max length, hex color format
publicApiSurface: QRCodeRequest { url: string; color?: { dark?: string; light?: string } }
